feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Iran proposes military control of Strait of Hormuz, raising tensions #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Iran's move could heighten regional instability, impacting global oil markets and increasing geopolitical tensions, with uncertain diplomatic outcomes. The post Iran proposes military control of Strait of Hormuz, raising tensions appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Sunrun Prices $584 million Securitization of Residential Solar and Storage Assets #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sunrun (Nasdaq: RUN), America’s largest provider of home battery storage, solar, and home-to-grid power plants, today announced it has priced a securitization of leases and power purchase agreements. The securitization is Sunrun’s sixteenth securitization since 2015 and first issuance in 2026.

entry.title: Buying crypto in a bear market is a cheaper way to play the AI boom, this former Tiger Management executive says #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Artificial intelligence may be one of the most crowded trades in financial markets right now — but bitcoin, which is currently mired in a bear market, could be a cheaper way to play the AI boom.

entry.title: Starbucks raises full-year outlook as turnaround takes hold #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.

entry.title: The Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial has just begun. Here’s what’s at stake. #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Musk claims OpenAI abandoned its core mission in the pursuit of profit, but OpenAI’s lawyer says ‘we are here because Mr. Musk didn’t get his ⁠way.’

entry.title: Stifel cuts Zimmer Biomet stock price target on mixed quarter #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Stifel cuts Zimmer Biomet stock price target on mixed quarter

entry.title: China Pulls the Plug on Meta’s AI Acquisition #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The reversal underscores Beijing’s shifting national security concerns.

entry.title: Visa Earnings Impress as the Company Grows Its Net Revenue At Its Highest Rate Since 2022 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Visa just crushed Wall Street's quarterly targets, and the company is buying back more stock.

entry.title: The UAE Has Left OPEC #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The UAE Has Left OPEC

entry.title: These 5 AI-proof jobs are hiring — here’s how much they pay and how to get them #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Careers that are not as vulnerable to AI right now share a few common traits: they require physical presence, specialized training, or real-time human interaction.

entry.title: Great News for Tesla Stock Investors #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Higher oil prices are driving more consumers to EVs.

entry.title: Investors Should Buy Broadcom's Stock Before Everything Changes #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Broadcom management expects $100 billion in custom AI chip revenue next year.

entry.title: Stock Market Today, April 28: BigBear.ai Rises on Heavy Volume Ahead of Earnings as AI Defense Stocks See Increased Trading Activity #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: With revenue dependent on government contracts, BigBear.ai’s earnings and any updates on program awards or backlog conversion will be key to assessing whether recent trading momentum reflects underlying business traction.

entry.title: Should You Buy AMD Stock Before the Huge Investor Update? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: AMD is scheduled to report its quarterly financial results, which could have significant implications for investors.

entry.title: The government is meddling with earnings reporting — but Tesla, Amazon and other market superstars prove there’s no problem #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Investors aren’t trapped in short-term thinking — but the SEC still wants semiannual earnings reporting.

entry.title: Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Bitcoin Magazine Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl used a Bitcoin industry stage in Las Vegas to defend a reserve strategy that mixes strict inflation control with measured exposure to digital assets. This post Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .

entry.title: Tech selloff raises AI concerns, Nvidia market cap odds dip #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The tech selloff highlights market volatility and underscores the fragility of AI-driven valuations, impacting investor confidence. The post Tech selloff raises AI concerns, Nvidia market cap odds dip appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: The Cartel Cracks: What the UAE Exit Means #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: InvestorPlace - Stock Market News, Stock Advice & Trading Tips The UAE is leaving OPEC… what will it mean for volatility?… POET's 50% collapse... did you take profits?... OpenAI is struggling with revenues… will it generate enough to meet its compute obligations? The post The Cartel Cracks: What the UAE Exit Means appeared first on InvestorPlace .

entry.title: PROLOGIS DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) declared a regular cash dividend for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, on the following securities: A dividend of $1.07 per share of the company's common stock, payable on June 30, 2026, to...

entry.title: Robinhood’s Q1 crypto revenue and trading volume fall nearly 50% #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The company reported a 7% year-over-year increase in transaction revenues, posting a total of $623 million for the quarter.
